findings.description: SQL ID `UPDATE_SALES` is defined in the SQL file shown in s3 but is absent from s3's hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source SQL file defines: `UPDATE_SALES = UPDATE SALES SET KINGAKU = :KINGAKU WHERE CST_ID = :CST_ID`

findings.description: Class name `CM211AE1Component` appears in the SQL file path referenced in s3 (`nablarch/sample/ss11AE/CM211AE1Component.sql`) but is missing from s3's hints. It is also missing from s4's hints despite being the component class whose `registerSales` method is demonstrated.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `ファイル名:nablarch/sample/ss11AE/CM211AE1Component.sql` and `public class CM211AE1Component extends DbAccessSupport { public void registerSales(W11AE01Form form) { ... } }`
